name: Cheese-Stuffed Acorn Squash
recipeIngredient: 6 Oz. Monterey Jack or Icelandic cheese - diced
4 Slices white bread, toasted and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Cut a slice from the bottom of the squash so it can stand upright.
3. Cut a hole in the top to form a lid.
4. Scoop out the seeds.
5. Sprinkle salt and pepper inside the squash.
6. Layer the cheese, bread, butter, and milk over the salt and pepper.
7. Sprinkle salt and pepper on top of the filling.
8. Place the lid back on the squash.
9. Transfer to a baking dish and bake for 1 1/2 hours or until tender when pierced with a fork.
